title: cheirostylis wenshanensis
intro: Cheirostylis wenshanensis, also known as Wenshan Cheirostylis, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to China. It belongs to the genus Cheirostylis, a type of terrestrial orchid. The medicinal properties of Cheirostylis wenshanensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are derived from its alkaloid compounds. The plant is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, and is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for its health benefits.
